pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project aims to run on JDK 21; without this, the compiler targets JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.x to 3.2.x to support Jakarta EE 9+ and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JDK 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud to 2023.0.x to align with Spring Boot 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using @Resource or @PostConstruct will fail to compile or link.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.activation with jakarta.activation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.activation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using Activation APIs will fail to compile or link.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace mybatis-plus-boot-starter with mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The standard starter is incompatible with Spring Boot 3's auto-configuration changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade gRPC Spring Boot starter to 3.x to support Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: gRPC Spring Boot starter 2.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate Validator to 8.x to support Jakarta EE 9+ validation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate Validator 6.x depends on javax.validation; 8.x depends on jakarta.validation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit jakarta.validation-api dependency to ensure Jakarta validation API is available.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta Validation; explicit dependency ensures correct version management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit jakarta.json-api dependency to ensure Jakarta JSON API is available.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta JSON; explicit dependency ensures correct version management.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Protobuf to 4.x to align with gRPC 1.63+ and modern Java standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: gRPC 1.63+ requires Protobuf 4.x; older versions may cause runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove MongoDB dependency as it is no longer used in this version.
Remove MyBatis Dynamic Datasource dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove Knife4j and Swagger dependencies, likely replaced by SpringDoc or native OpenAPI support.
Upgrade Netty to 4.1.109.Final for security and bug fixes.
Upgrade Jackson to 2.17.0 for latest features and security fixes.
Upgrade SnakeYAML to 2.2 for security fixes.
Upgrade Bouncy Castle to 1.78.1 for security and algorithm updates.
Upgrade J-Interop to 3.0.0 for better Windows COM integration.
Upgrade JNA to 5.14.0 for native access improvements.
Upgrade OSHI to 6.6.0 for system hardware information updates.
Upgrade Milo to 0.6.12 for OPC UA client improvements.
Upgrade Activation API to 2.1.3 (Jakarta) to match Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Add Apache Commons Compress dependency for archive handling.
Add MQTT v5 client dependency for modern MQTT protocol support.
Add -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names in bytecode for reflection.
Update project version to 2024.1.5.
Update inception year to 2024.
Update developer email and add roles/URL for better metadata.
Update project description to English and clarify purpose.
pom.xml.before: IOT DC3 平台 父级 Maven Pom 配置。
pom.xml.after: IoT DC3 is an open source, distributed Internet of Things (IoT) platform based on Spring Cloud.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade gRPC core to 1.63.0 for latest features and fixes.
Upgrade Maven GPG plugin to 3.2.4.
Remove unused Spring Data Commons version property.
Remove unused Commons Lang3 and FileUpload dependencies.
Add javax.annotation-api as a separate dependency for legacy compatibility if needed.
Add Hibernate Validator CDI module for CDI integration.
